summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kurry Leaf restaurant website. All major features working correctly including homepage, navigation, menu with categories, cart functionality, checkout form, admin panel, and mobile responsiveness.
action_items: Consider adding aria-describedby to SheetContent component to fix accessibility warning (optional)
critical_code_review_comments: All state is MOCKED using React Context and localStorage - no backend API integration
WhatsApp order confirmation opens WhatsApp web with pre-filled message - working correctly
Free delivery logic correctly shows progress bar for orders < ₹299
Admin settings persist in localStorage and affect ordering behavior
seed_data_creation: N/A - Uses default menu items and reviews from code
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only React app with all state managed via React Context and localStorage. No backend API. Key features tested: Homepage hero, navigation scrolling, menu categories (Signature, Starters, Main Course, Biryani, Thali, Beverages), add to cart, cart drawer with quantity controls, free delivery logic (>=₹299), checkout form, admin panel (/admin) with Settings/Orders/Reviews tabs, mobile hamburger menu, WhatsApp floating button, contact form with map.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - Renders with logo, navigation, Kurry Leaf title
homepage.navigation_links: PASS - All 6 links (Home, About, Offers, Menu, Reviews, Contact) work
homepage.whatsapp_button: PASS - Floating button visible and opens popup

menu_section.add_to_cart: PASS - Add button adds items with toast notification
menu_section.quantity_controls: PASS - +/- buttons work in menu and cart

cart_functionality.cart_drawer: PASS - Opens with items, shows quantity controls
cart_functionality.free_delivery_logic: PASS - Shows FREE for orders >=₹299, progress bar for smaller orders
cart_functionality.checkout_form: PASS - Name, phone, address fields present

admin_panel.settings_tab: PASS - Ordering toggle, peak charge, WhatsApp alerts, delivery settings
admin_panel.orders_tab: PASS - Shows 'No orders yet' when empty
admin_panel.reviews_tab: PASS - Shows 'No reviews yet' when empty

mobile_responsive.hamburger_menu: PASS - Opens and shows all navigation links

other_sections.about_section: PASS - Shows restaurant story and features
other_sections.offers_section: PASS - 3D offer cards with delivery info
other_sections.reviews_section: PASS - Default reviews display, Write a Review button
other_sections.contact_section: PASS - Form, map, Instagram link present

mocked_apis_note: ALL ordering and state is MOCKED in frontend using React Context and localStorage. No real backend API calls.
